summary.lv: Swedbank meklē UX Team Lead, kurš/-a definēs UX vīziju digitālajiem kanāliem (internetbankai un mobilajai lietotnei), vadīs daudznozaru dizaina komandu un pārvaldīs dizaina sistēmu.
summary.en: Swedbank is looking for a UX Team Lead to define the UX vision across digital channels (Internet Bank and Mobile App), lead a multidisciplinary design team, and own design systems governance.
